title: Events
metaDescription: Join WTP Advisory at our upcoming webinars, seminars and networking events on doing business in Vietnam.

hero.title: Our Events
hero.subtitle: Take part in WTP Advisory's events, webinars and networking opportunities and maximize your network with our partners to grow your business and career.

sections.heading: WTP Advisory's Schedule of Events
sections.subtitle: Looking for additional insights? Join one of our upcoming virtual events or watch a recording from anywhere.

items.title: From Singapore to Vietnam: The 2026 Cross-Border Business & Investment Dialogue
items.desc: Gain first-hand insights into Vietnam's major regulatory shifts for 2026 and what they mean for cross-border investors.

items.title: From Singapore to Vietnam: Turning Strategic Ties into Smart Investments
items.desc: An insightful session designed for Singapore-based business owners, SME leaders and startups expanding into Vietnam.

items.title: Is “Made in Vietnam” The New “Made in China”?
items.desc: Exploring Vietnam's manufacturing trends and what they mean for foreign investors and businesses.

items.title: Tax Compliance Risks for Foreigners in Vietnam
items.desc: A practical webinar for foreign individuals and businesses on avoiding common tax compliance pitfalls in Vietnam.

items.title: WTP Advisory x FLI: How can sales strategic management boost your sales? – Hanoi
items.desc: FDI enterprise solutions seminar on strategic sales management for businesses in northern Vietnam.

items.title: Vietnam Economic Outlook: Half-Year Review and Future Prospects for H2 2024 and Beyond
items.desc: A mid-year review of Vietnam's economy and what lies ahead, hosted with CanCham.

items.title: [Savills x WTP Advisory] Gateway to Growth 2024: Ha Noi and Northern Vietnam's Investment Landscape
items.desc: Exploring investment opportunities across Hanoi and northern Vietnam, co-hosted with Savills.

items.title: Representative Offices in Vietnam: 5 Key Legal Exemptions for Businesses to Keep in Mind
items.desc: Understand the key legal exemptions and obligations when running a representative office in Vietnam.

items.title: Mastering Chief Accountant Compliance in Vietnam: Essential Guidelines for 2024
items.desc: Essential guidance on the chief accountant requirement and accounting compliance in Vietnam.

items.title: One WTP Advisory, Eight Markets: Expand Your Horizons Series – Vietnam Market Insights in Hong Kong
items.desc: Vietnam market insights for Hong Kong-based investors as part of the One WTP Advisory, Eight Markets series.

items.title: Bridging Borders: Vietnam Launchpad – Move, Build, Succeed for Overseas Vietnamese
items.desc: Season 2 of Bridging Borders returns with practical insights for Overseas Vietnamese building in Vietnam.

items.title: Bridging Borders: Navigating Opportunities and Challenges for Overseas Vietnamese in Vietnam
items.desc: A discussion of the opportunities and challenges facing Overseas Vietnamese returning to do business in Vietnam.

sections.title: Want to be notified of upcoming events?
sections.subtitle: Subscribe and never miss an WTP Advisory event.
